title: Deirdre of the Sorrows
description: The most tragic love story in Irish literature: Deirdre's prophecy, her flight with Naoise, and their destruction by King Conchobar.
introduction: The most tragic love story in Irish literature: Deirdre's prophecy, her flight with Naoise, and their destruction by King Conchobar.

translation.original_text: Is ed dorigne in ingen, lassar derg do thabairt assa beolu.
translation.text: The girl let out a sharp cry from her lips.

translation.original_text: Truag sin, a Chonchobuir, ní ba mé bus beo i ndiaid Noísiu.
translation.text: Wretched it is, O Conchobar — I will not live after Naoise.
